name: Gemini 3 Regex Wizard
description: Generates complex regular expressions and explains the matching logic for specific pattern requests.
preconditions: prompt provides examples of text to match or avoid
postconditions: output provides a valid regex pattern
output explains what each part of the regex does
the regex is tested against the provided examples in the explanation
evidence_requirements: verifies the regex doesn't match negative examples

steps.text: Analyze target pattern and edge cases from examples
Construct regex pattern and verify against examples
Provide detailed breakdown of the regex parts
